metricCatalog.definition: Sum of posted net revenue after contractual adjustments.
Operating income divided by net revenue.
Direct labor expense divided by adjusted cases.
Denied claims divided by submitted claims.
Net accounts receivable divided by average daily net revenue.
Supply expense divided by adjusted cases.
Actual expense minus budget, divided by budget.
One minus absolute forecast error divided by actuals.
Weighted clinical acuity index used for finance normalization.
Inpatient and equivalent outpatient case volume.

recommendations.title: Certify shared finance KPIs first
recommendations.body: Focus metric owner reviews on the reports with low certified metric coverage and high stakeholder demand.

recommendations.title: Move recurring Excel tabs into monitored Power BI pages
recommendations.body: The highest standardization scores combine manual monthly effort, refresh failures, and open high-priority requirements.

recommendations.title: Package SAC handoffs with access and currency rules
recommendations.body: Planning requests are only ready when mappings, currency logic, and data access reviews are documented together.
